header.recHint: Your whole session — drawings, choices, timing, answers and chat — is being recorded for later expert review.

about.title: A symbolic self-reflection experience
about.p1: This is a self-reflection experience inspired by the House-Tree-Person task. You draw or choose a house, a tree, and a person, then reflect on them in your own words while a chatbot asks gentle questions.
about.p2: It is inspired by the practice of making vision or dream boards — choosing images that feel meaningful — rather than by clinical testing.
about.expertTitle: AI does not make the final interpretation
about.expertBody: The AI organizes observations, summarizes your words and suggests questions. Any meaningful interpretation requires review by a qualified expert in context.
about.privacy: No real name is collected. Your session is stored anonymously under a random ID and you can download or delete it at the end.

landing.headline: Explore yourself through house, tree, and person symbols.
landing.sub: You can draw them yourself or choose images that feel meaningful to you. This experience is for self-reflection, not diagnosis.
landing.recNote: Your whole process is recorded for expert review
landing.s1d: A house, a tree, and a person — in your own way.
landing.s2d: Answer a few gentle questions about each one.
landing.s3d: A chatbot helps you notice — never diagnoses.

consent.title: Before we begin
consent.intro: This is a self-reflection experience, not a clinical or diagnostic test. Please read and confirm the following.
consent.recBody: Your full process is recorded: your drawings, the order and timing of your strokes, the images you choose, your written answers, and your chat with the AI. This record is kept so a qualified expert can review it later.
consent.i1: I understand this is a self-reflection experience and not a clinical diagnosis.
consent.i2: I understand my whole process — drawings, drawing order and timing, image choices, written answers, and chat — is recorded for this session.
consent.i3: I understand the AI does not provide a final interpretation, and that meaningful interpretation requires expert review.
consent.i4: Optional: I allow my anonymized session to be used for research.

survey.title: A little about you
survey.sub: No real name is needed. This helps an expert read your session in context. Answer only what you wish.

mode.title: How would you like to begin?
mode.sub: Each path moves through house, tree, and person. There is no right choice — pick what feels natural.
mode.drawD: Use a simple black pen and eraser to draw a house, a tree, and a person.
mode.imgD: Like a vision board — select or upload images of a house, tree, and person that feel close to you.
mode.hybD: Draw each symbol first, then choose an image that resonates with it.
mode.recordingNote: Whichever you choose, your process is recorded for later expert review.

task.askHint: There is no right way — draw it however you like.
task.drawHouse: Please draw a house. It does not need to be artistic — draw it in your own way.
task.drawTree: Please draw a tree. It does not need to be realistic — draw it naturally.
task.drawPerson: Please draw a whole person, not only a head or face. It does not need to be perfect.

image.instruction: Choose the image that feels most meaningful to you right now. You do not need to explain it perfectly.
image.house: Choose a house that feels meaningful
image.tree: Choose a tree that feels meaningful
image.person: Choose a person that feels meaningful
image.curatedLabel: Or pick a starting point from the curated set

followup.title: A few words on what you made
followup.sub: Your own explanation matters more than the image alone. Write freely — short is fine.

fq.house1: Whose house is this, or who might live here?
fq.house2: What is the weather or atmosphere around this house?
fq.house4: Why did you draw or choose this house?
fq.tree1: What type of tree is this, and where does it live?
fq.tree4: Why did you draw or choose this tree?
fq.person1: Who might this person be, and what are they doing?
fq.person4: Why did you draw or choose this person?
fq.hyb1: How is your drawing similar to the image you chose?
fq.hyb3: Which one feels closer to you right now?

reflect.loadingSub: Gathering observations, your words, and reflection questions.
reflect.title: Your reflection, organized
reflect.disclaimer: This experience uses AI to organize visual observations, your explanations, and reflective questions. The AI does not provide a final psychological interpretation — any meaningful interpretation should be reviewed by a qualified expert in context.
reflect.safety: This reflection is not a diagnosis. It is a symbolic reading based on your drawings or image choices and your own explanations, prepared for review by a qualified expert.

chat.title: Reflect together
chat.sub: Ask anything about your session. I can help you notice and organize — but I will not give a final interpretation.
chat.greeting: I have gathered your house, tree, and person, along with your own words. Where would you like to begin? I can help you notice patterns, but your explanations matter most.
quick: Compare my house, tree and person
Give me a gentle action step
chat.fallback: I can help you notice features, summarize your own words, and suggest reflection questions — but I cannot give a final psychological interpretation. A qualified expert should review this in context. (Live AI is unavailable right now.)

export.title: Your reflection card
export.sub: A summary of your session, ready to keep or hand to an expert reviewer. The full record can be downloaded as data.
export.cardSafety: Not a diagnosis. Prepared for expert review.
export.dataNote: Stored: anonymous demographics, drawings, selected images, follow-up answers, and AI chat history — under a random ID with no real name. You can download or discard it here.
